title: ISAT GUI
description: In Stars and Time themed GUI! Almost entirely monochrome with some red :3
body:
Intended to be layered with a monochrome texture pack! 

1.21 file should be compatible with most versions 1.9+, though there may be broken textures
# 

**Currently includes:**
- inventory
- hotbar + icons
- menu buttons
- mob effect icons
- options background

Planned to eventually include all gui sprites, but itll likely take a while!
